name: add-provider-doc
tagline: Checklist workflow for documenting a new AI provider: usage docs, env-var docs, Docker config, .env.example, images.
verdict: Well-structured contribution workflow with concrete file paths and templates, and correctly warns against embedding real API keys in docs. Weak on failure handling (no guidance if the reference doc or CDN upload fails) and re-run safety (Dockerfile/.env edits have no duplicate-entry guard); no version/changelog.

highlights.summary: No failure/fallback guidance if reference file, CDN upload, or screenshots are missing across the 5-step flow.
Dockerfile ENV addition and .env.example update have no check for an existing entry before appending.
No version field or changelog section.
